case_title: TAT KWONG CHOW VS. SACHIKO HOTCHKISS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,575.29 FILED BY CHOW, TAT KWONG AS TO DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE RESET AND ADDRESS CHANGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--ANTHONY TAM. DEFENDANT WAS HELPED BY SHELLEY CRUZ FROM AAA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, TAT KWONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO $1,575.29 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS RECEIVED, FILED AND FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT FOR PROCESS.
